rows.description: To Mr. Richmond for ye 5th of Oct 1718 Wine
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct description and amounts, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread the date and amounts.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Richmond for wine supplied for the 5th of October 1718.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Richmond for wine supplied for the 5th of October 1718, amounting to £1 4s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct amounts, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds and shillings.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Wright the goldsmith for metalwork or plate services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Wright the goldsmith for metalwork or plate services, amounting to £1 2s 0d.

rows.notes: All extractors agreed on amounts. Description also consistent. Confirmed by visual verification.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Hallifax the ironmonger for ironmongery supplies or work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Hallifax the ironmonger for ironmongery supplies or work, amounting to £0 5s 5d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Selected gemini-flash's description as 'Brazier' is a better visual match than 'Drapier'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Payne the brazier for metalwork or brazier services.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Payne the brazier for metalwork or brazier services, amounting to £0 17s 8d.

rows.description: P. J. Pope for Thrup 4 years
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct description and amounts, confirmed by visual verification. gpt-5-mini had multiple misreads in the description and pence value.
rows.english_description: Payment to J. Pope relating to the holding at Thrupp covering four years.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to J. Pope relating to the holding at Thrupp covering four years, amounting to £1 17s 5d.

rows.description: P. J. Kings tax Due at Lady Day Last past
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Selected gemini-flash's description for a slightly more accurate transcription of 'Kings'.
rows.english_description: Payment of J. King's tax which was due at Lady Day last past.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of J. King's tax which was due at Lady Day last past, amounting to £3 12s 0d.

rows.description: P. M. Dormans wife bill for Linnenge
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Selected gemini-flash for its significantly more accurate description. gpt-5-mini misread the names and key words.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mrs Dormans (the wife of Dormans) for a bill for linen.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mrs Dormans (the wife of Dormans) for a bill for linen, amounting to £0 9s 4d.

rows.description: P. to Mr. ye Paynes at two severall payments
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash's description, which is more accurate. Confirmed no amounts on this line as it is the first part of a braced group with the total on the subsequent line. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed the amount here and misread the description significantly.
rows.english_description: Payments made to Mr Payne in two separate instalments.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments made to Mr Payne in two separate instalments; amount not stated.

rows.description: By Mr. Adams of Apsweth by two Receipt
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for correct description and amounts, visually confirmed. The amount of 55 pounds, 11 shillings, and 0 pence with 0.25 fraction (farthing) is clearly visible and correctly attributed to the braced group by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini completely missed the amounts on this line and had significant errors in its description and structural interpretation.
rows.english_description: Receipts from Mr Adams of Apsweth received in two receipts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipts from Mr Adams of Apsweth received in two receipts, amounting to £55 11s 0.25d.

rows.description: P. J. Blays Tax for his Tenement
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Selected gemini-flash for its significantly more accurate description. gpt-5-mini misread the names and key words.
rows.english_description: Payment of J. Blay's tax for his tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of J. Blay's tax for his tenement, amounting to £0 8s 4d.

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini for the correct interpretation of the pence fraction as 0.5 (halfpenny), based on visual confirmation of the 'obol' symbol after the digit '1'. Pounds and shillings are agreed by both.

Selected gemini-flash for correct pence value of '10'. gpt-5-mini's note indicating it overrode visual confusion based on internal arithmetic is a critical error in its reasoning. Visual inspection clearly shows '10', not '2'.

Selected gemini-flash for the correct interpretation of the pence fraction as 0.75 (three farthings), based on visual confirmation of the 'q' symbol after the digit '3'. gpt-5-mini misidentified this as a halfpenny and again cited 'internal arithmetic' which is a problematic justification.
